overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character jogging through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The character moves along wet sidewalks and elevated walkways past holographic advertisements, glowing signage, and scattered pedestrians while rain creates reflective surfaces on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city street with neon storefronts and digital billboards

events.description: character transitions from walking to jogging pace along the wet sidewalk

agents.ego_description: jogging along the rain-soaked sidewalk past other pedestrians and vehicles, with wet reflections visible on the ground

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk
dark sedan driving past on the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: building with large circular 'PHERE' logo and green neon trim along the facade
large digital screen displaying food advertisement with visible dishes
black garbage bags and litter piled against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character jogs along a wet city sidewalk at night, rain falling steadily. The PHERE building with its distinctive circular logo dominates the left side while a large digital billboard glows on the right. Other pedestrians walk ahead and vehicles pass on the rain-slicked street, their headlights creating reflections on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings and overhead cover

events.description: turns left off the street onto an elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings
moving under overhead glass canopy creates different light reflections on the wet tiled surface

agents.ego_description: turning onto an elevated walkway and continuing past futuristic benches and vertical neon installations

entered.detail: curved glass and metal railing structure enclosing the elevated walkway
tall vertical purple neon light pillars mounted in concrete planters with vegetation
illuminated advertising kiosk displaying 'CALL NOW' and vehicle advertisements
futuristic benches with glowing cyan light strips underneath

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto an elevated pedestrian walkway sheltered from the rain by a glass canopy. The area features modern glass railings, vertical purple neon pillars, and illuminated cyan benches. The wet tiled floor reflects the vibrant neon lights, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere with no other pedestrians present.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza in front of hotel with circular neon facade and digital signage

events.description: character slows and camera tilts upward to view the upper floors of the hotel building
camera tilts up revealing large rooftop digital billboard and building facade against dark sky

agents.ego_description: approaching a hotel entrance, slowing to look up at the towering neon-lit building with circular light rings

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing and conversing near the hotel entrance

entered.detail: building with horizontal circular neon light rings and vertical Japanese signage reading 'Hotel'
large rooftop screen displaying animated character in pink and purple hues
metal roll-down security shutter with red neon sign above

segments.scene_description: The character enters a plaza dominated by a hotel with distinctive circular neon rings wrapping around its facade. The camera tilts up to reveal a massive rooftop digital billboard displaying an animated character. Several NPCs stand near the hotel entrance while the character observes the towering architecture before continuing past.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway approaching street intersection with crosswalk

events.description: approaching crosswalk to descend back to street level from elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway toward a street crossing, passing neon installations and scattered litter

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing umbrella crossing the street at the intersection ahead

entered.detail: pedestrian crossing signal box with yellow walk symbol illuminated
scattered cardboard and litter on the wet walkway surface

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the elevated walkway, moving away from the hotel toward a street intersection. The crosswalk signal box becomes visible on the right as the character approaches the descent point. A pedestrian with an umbrella crosses the street below, and scattered trash is visible on the wet pavement as the character nears the end of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban corridor that shifts from a crowded street level to a sheltered, neon-lit elevated walkway. It begins with the character jogging along a wet sidewalk beneath the towering PHERE building and glowing billboards, where headlights reflect off the rain-slicked pavement. As the character turns left, the scene transitions into a sheltered pedestrian bridge defined by glass railings, purple neon pillars, and cyan benches that shimmer on the wet tiled floor. The path then opens into a plaza dominated by a hotel with circular neon rings, where the camera tilts upward to reveal a massive animated rooftop billboard before the character moves past waiting pedestrians. Finally, the camera follows the character away from the hotel toward a street intersection, passing a crosswalk signal box and overlooking a pedestrian with an umbrella on the trash-strewn pavement below.
